rulings.Case Title: EUGENE BARNES VS. EDWARD MILLER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 6, 2022 line 1. DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to July 6, 2022 on Court's own motion. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: VERONICA PEREZ VS. JACQUELINE RODRIGUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-21-589767 WITH CASE CGC-20-585424
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 6, 2022 line 2. DEFENDANT JACQUELINE RODRIGUEZ'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-21-589767 WITH CASE CGC-20-585424 is DENIED as to consolidation for all purposes. The matters are already consolidated for trial. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that the two cases where parties are not identical may be consolidated for all purposes. Veronica Perez is not a party to CGC-21-589767 per the Court records. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: 6315 THIRD STREET, LLC VS. GREGORY HAYNES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Issue And Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 6, 2022 line 3. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ISSUE AND MONETARY SANCTIONS is GRANTED as follows. Defendants must appear for an in-person deposition on a mutually agreeable date no later than July 8, 2022. If parties cannot agree on a date, deposition of Gregory Haynes shall proceed at 9:00 a.m. on June 16, 2022; Deposition of Larry Haynes shall proceed at 9:00 a.m. on June 21, 2022. Compliance hearing is set for July 15, 2022. Any supplemental briefs re: compliance to be filed no later than July 12, 2022. Sanctions granted in the amount of $4,134 jointly and severally against defendants to be paid no later than July 29, 2022. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. COY CATLEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 6, 2022 line 6. DEFENDANT COY CATLEY'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is DENIED. Complaint states a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Issues of fact regarding applicability of grievance procedure requirements to the Plaintiff are not proper subject of the motion before the Court. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
